prompt: Create a hyper-realistic 8K UHD cinematic poster portrait of a man inspired by the reference image, with a similar hairstyle, facial structure, and body build while maintaining a natural realistic look. Shot as if captured on a 35mm lens, f/1.8, with sharp focus, creamy bokeh, cinematic color grading, and detailed DSLR skin texture. Design a modern graphic poster titled "Chill-out." The man wears a red hoodie, black cuffed joggers, red and white Air Jordan high-top sneakers, dark sunglasses, and silver rings. He sits in a relaxed reclined pose leaning against oversized typography, one leg bent and the other slightly extended toward the viewer. His body angles right while his face turns toward the camera in a confident three-quarter view. Background is matte textured black. Large bold white sans-serif text "chill" and "out" forms a bench-like structure, with "chill" underlined. Add orange circles, squares, thin white grid lines, and phrases: "Life is so much easier when you just chill-out" and "Less stress, more chill." Bottom-right watermark;
